en_title: Capcom Pulls Dragon's Dogma 2 Microtransactions Ahead of Dark Arisen Expansion Release
cn_title: 《龙之信条2》资料片发布前夕，卡普空移除微交易
subtitle: 微交易退场
opus_summary: 卡普空宣布在《龙之信条2》资料片《黑暗觉者》前下架豪华版及部分DLC，本体降价。该作因首发21种微交易曾招批评，售价0.99至4.99美元(约合人民币7至34元)。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has announced plans to pull Dragon’s Dogma 2 microtransactions from sale ahead of the release of the Dark Arisen expansion.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空宣布，计划在《龙之信条2》的《黑暗觉者》资料片发售前，下架游戏内的微交易项目。

paragraphs.en: The company will discontinue the Deluxe Edition of the action RPG as well as “certain DLC items” on June 24. This comes alongside a permanent discount for the digital version of the base game.
paragraphs.cn: 这家公司将于6月24日停售这款动作RPG的豪华版以及「部分DLC道具」。同时，游戏本体的数字版将永久降价。

paragraphs.en: In a post on social media , Capcom listed the microtransactions it was pulling from sale, including the character editor and the warp location marker.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空在社交媒体上发帖，列出了即将下架的微交易项目，其中包括角色编辑器和传送点标记。

paragraphs.en: Dragon’s Dogma 2 was criticized at launch back in 2024 for its microtransactions , with over 21 available on launch day. These ranged in price from $0.99 to $4.99, and included an Explorer’s Camping Kit for $2.99, a $0.99 gaol key that lets you escape from gaol but breaks after a single use, a Portcrystal warp location marker that costs $2.99, and $0.99 Wakestones that restore the dead to life.
paragraphs.cn: 《龙之信条2》在2024年首发时因其微交易而受到批评，发售当天就提供了超过21种微交易项目。这些项目的价格从0.99美元(约合人民币7元)到4.99美元(约合人民币34元)不等，包括售价2.99美元(约合人民币20元)的探险家露营套装、0.99美元(约合人民币7元)的牢狱钥匙（可让玩家越狱，但用一次就坏）、2.99美元(约合人民币20元)的传送基石（传送点标记），以及0.99美元(约合人民币7元)的复活石，能复活死者。

paragraphs.en: While these microtransaction items were easily obtainable in-game through simply playing, and many never felt the need to spend money on them, they sparked controversy not just for the sheer number available day-one, but because they made parts of the game deliberately designed to challenge players in certain ways either easier, less frustrating, or quicker. Modders ended up making these items available in unlimited numbers in response .
paragraphs.cn: 虽然这些微交易道具只需正常游玩就能轻松在游戏中获取，许多玩家也从未觉得有必要为此花钱，但它们引发争议不仅是因为首发日提供的数量之多，还因为它们让游戏中那些有意设计来挑战玩家的部分变得更容易、更轻松或更快。作为回应，Mod制作者最终让这些道具变得可以无限量获取。

paragraphs.en: Capcom has already released a major title update for Dragon’s Dogma 2, and plans another for the end of August that will improve the frame-rate, add additional save slots, and make a number of quality-of-life improvements. Dark Arisen itself launches on October 9 2026.
paragraphs.cn: 卡普空已经为《龙之信条2》推出了一次重大标题更新，并计划在8月底再推出一次更新，以提升帧率、增加更多存档栏位，并进行多项体验改善。《黑暗觉者》资料片将于2026年10月9日发售。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
